title: Prowlarr
description: Link UltraTorrent to an optional Prowlarr companion container for indexer management. Prowlarr runs as a separate service — this only stores the connection and checks its health.

fields.internalUrlHint: How the backend reaches Prowlarr (e.g. http://prowlarr:9696 on the Docker network).
fields.publicUrlHint: The URL your browser uses for the Open Prowlarr link (e.g. http://localhost:9696).
fields.apiKeyKeep: Leave blank to keep the current key
fields.apiKeyHint: Find it in Prowlarr under Settings → General → Security. Stored encrypted; never shown again.

help.title: Optional companion container
help.body: Prowlarr is not bundled into UltraTorrent. To run the bundled Prowlarr companion service, enable the Docker profile:
